tasks.title: Investigate chat button click handler and popup state management
tasks.description: Review the chat button component and related popup component to understand how the open/close state is managed on click events. Identify why the popup opens on first click but not on subsequent clicks.
acceptanceCriteria: Code locations responsible for chat button click and popup visibility are identified
Cause of popup not opening on second click is understood
tasks.expectedResult: Clear understanding of the current popup open/close logic and the root cause of the issue

metadata.inputContext: Project source code related to chat button and popup UI
evidence: Relevant source files located and reviewed
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for fixing popup toggle behavior

tasks.title: Modify chat button click handler to toggle popup visibility correctly
tasks.description: Update the chat button component's click handler logic to toggle the popup open state on every click, not just the first. Ensure the popup component receives and reacts to the updated open state properly.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup opens on first click and toggles open/close on subsequent clicks
No console errors related to popup state
Popup closes when clicking outside if applicable
tasks.expectedResult: Chat button toggles popup visibility correctly on every click

outputPlan.description: Update click handler to toggle popup open state
Ensure popup visibility controlled by open state prop

metadata.inputContext: Understanding of current popup open state management
evidence: Popup toggles open and close on button clicks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Fixes the core issue of popup not opening on second click

tasks.title: Add unit tests for chat button popup toggle behavior
tasks.description: Create or update unit tests for the chat button and popup components to verify that the popup opens on first click and toggles correctly on subsequent clicks. Include tests for closing popup when clicking outside if applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover popup open/close toggle on button clicks
tasks.expectedResult: Automated tests verify correct popup toggle behavior

outputPlan.description: Add tests for popup toggle on button clicks

metadata.inputContext: Modified chat button and popup components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures popup toggle behavior is reliably tested

tasks.title: Perform manual QA to verify chat button popup behavior in UI
tasks.description: Manually test the chat button in the running application to confirm the popup opens on first click and toggles open/close on subsequent clicks. Verify no UI glitches or unexpected behavior occur.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup opens and closes correctly on button clicks
No UI glitches or errors observed
tasks.expectedResult: Manual confirmation that popup toggle behavior is fixed and stable

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates the fix in real usage scenario
